open_p1.blocker: No successful independent offsite backup upload and restore from that uploaded copy.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Configure restricted offsite credentials, run scripts/backup.sh, restore the uploaded database and objects, and compare application/ledger/artifact invariants.

open_p1.blocker: The candidate was not deployed to a persistent TLS staging environment.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Deploy the exact source/image to representative staging and pass health, readiness, version, auth, both workloads, webhook, lifecycle, and money checks.

open_p1.blocker: Rollback was not rehearsed against a prior content-addressed image.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Run scripts/rollback.sh against the previous compatible image in staging, verify version/readiness/customer paths/reconciliation, then redeploy the candidate.

open_p1.blocker: The complete Stripe test-mode cash and payout matrix was not executed end to end.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Prove duplicate/out-of-order webhook handling, authorize/capture, actual fee, refund, dispute, payout success/failure/outcome-unknown, and reconciliation using scoped test-mode ids.

open_p1.blocker: Alert rules have not delivered and resolved a synthetic page through the real on-call receiver.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Load monitoring/alerts.yml, configure routing, fire one synthetic page, acknowledge/resolve it, and record timestamps.

release_conditions: All five remaining external P1 exit criteria pass on the exact committed candidate.
PR #5 stays green on the current head and all four candidate artifacts pass downloaded checksum verification.
Re-run make prove-local and preserve the source-bound ledger with deployment, restore, payment, rollback, and alert receipts.
